prompt_text:
### Demographics: 42-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Atorvastatin (20 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.3 kg; Height 167.4 cm; BMI 25.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/91 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 214mg/dL; 9 months ago 222mg/dL; 6 months ago 199mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 181mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 69.3kg; 9 months ago 70.1kg; 6 months ago 70.2kg; 3 months ago 71.3kg; current 70.3kg), Height (12 months ago 167.4cm; 9 months ago 167.4cm; 6 months ago 167.4cm; 3 months ago 167.4cm; current 167.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 91mmHg; 3 months ago 90mmHg; current 91mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 88U/L; 9 months ago 87U/L; 6 months ago 88U/L; 3 months ago 85U/L; current 87U/L), AST (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 95U/L; 6 months ago 95U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 95U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 92mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; current 93mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 48mg/g; 9 months ago 67mg/g; 6 months ago 63mg/g; 3 months ago 46mg/g; current 58mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.4g/dL; 9 months ago 14.4g/dL; 6 months ago 14.3g/dL; 3 months ago 13.7g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
